properties.Test Case: Set to ABC branding. Ensure Grade level and "Level Letters" are working. (See note.) (JT 6.3.3028: there is no longer an ABC subscription, so this can't fully be done. I used download-for-edit to get an ABC book, and the "Grade 1" in the top right of the cover is present. I found that a Grade 3 book is immediately converted to grade 1 when edited, both in 6.3 and 6.1. I don't see any current way to create a new ABC book, so some of the things in Notes can't be tried. I don't know what "Level Letters" means.)
